description: Maximally-diverse panel of 8 Goodreads-grounded reader personas for book club simulation.

cast.label: The Emotional Reader
cast.role: Leads with gut reaction and emotional resonance. Characters must feel real.

cast.role: Leads with gut reaction and emotional resonance. Characters must feel real.

cast.label: The Classic Romantic
cast.role: Drawn to enduring stories. Emotionally engaged with timeless themes and lyrical prose.

cast.label: The Thoughtful General Reader
cast.role: Balanced taste and moderate style. Representing the mainstream book club voice.

cast.label: The Historical Scholar
cast.role: Deep knowledge of historical periods. Values period accuracy and research detail above all.
cast.era: a mix of classic and contemporary titles

cast.label: The Pragmatic Reader
cast.role: Reads for enjoyment and pace. Values clarity, momentum, and satisfying payoff.
